workflow.name: SeaweedFS HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate SeaweedFS HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare SeaweedFS inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/seaweedfs-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[seaweedfs]
10.31.131.11 role=object_storage name=seaweedfs-01
10.31.131.12 role=object_storage name=seaweedfs-02
10.31.131.13 role=object_storage name=seaweedfs-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install SeaweedFS container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/seaweedfs-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: seaweedfs
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/seaweedfs-inventory.ini /tmp/seaweedfs-runtime.yml

data.label: Render SeaweedFS cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/seaweedfs-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: seaweedfs
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/seaweedfs
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/seaweedfs/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            seaweedfs:
              image: chrislusf/seaweedfs:3.73
              container_name: octastack-seaweedfs
              restart: unless-stopped
              command: "server -dir=/data -s3"
              ports:
                - "9333:9333"
                - "8333:8333"
              volumes:
                - data:/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy SeaweedFS cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/seaweedfs-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/seaweedfs/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/seaweedfs/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/seaweedfs/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/seaweedfs-inventory.ini /tmp/seaweedfs-deploy.yml

data.label: Document SeaweedFS topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/seaweedfs-topology.md <<'EOF'
# SeaweedFS HA topology

Members:
- seaweedfs-01: 10.31.131.11 (object_storage)
- seaweedfs-02: 10.31.131.12 (object_storage)
- seaweedfs-03: 10.31.131.13 (object_storage)

This example deploys one SeaweedFS container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/seaweedfs-topology.md

data.label: Validate SeaweedFS cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/seaweedfs-inventory.ini seaweedfs -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
